None of Above Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that none of the above skin or ulcer treatments were provided. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
459 N0300_INJCT_MDCTN_DAY_NUM N0300_INJCT_MDCTN_DAY_NUM N0300 Number of Days Injections of Any Type CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received injections of any type in the past seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0 Minimum
7
